needTwoCtSeries: At least two CT series with images are required for side-by-side comparison. Load a study that contains multiple CT series.
modeValidationFail: Requires at least one CT series
copyLinkNoSeries: Select baseline and compare series first.
layoutMemoryClearedBody: Next visit will use automatic layout until you choose again.
segmentationHelp: Toggle a colored overlay of each structure on both CT viewports; click again to hide. When the MedSAM2 service is running it refines each structure with the model; otherwise it falls back to in-browser HU thresholds. Computed per slice and updated as you scroll.
clickPromptHelp: Pick a target, then click a lesion on either CT to segment that nodule / ice ball. The cyan ring is the ROI, the yellow dot is the click center, and only the red / purple overlay is the segmentation result; dragging ROI diameter updates the drawn ring. Uses MedSAM2 when running, otherwise a local region grow. Click more lesions to add them; 'Clear clicks' restores automatic detection.
model3dNeed3dLayout: Switch to the "Two stacks + 3D" layout first, so the bottom 3D viewport exists.
model3dNoSeries: Select a baseline CT series first.
model3dNoChannel: Select at least one structure to reconstruct.
model3dHelp: Reconstructs the selected structures from the segmented CT slices into a colored 3D surface in the bottom viewport. Only lung parenchyma is enabled for now; vessel / nodule / ice ball channels are reserved and will be added later. Building scans every slice and may take a few seconds.
footerHelp: Series may have different slice counts; sync approximates alignment by anatomy. If coverage is limited, the nearest slice is shown with a warning.
syncWarningOutOfRange: Limited coverage on the compare side; showing the nearest slice (~{{mm}} mm deviation).
errorSameSeries: Choose two different CT series (baseline and compare cannot be the same).
reconstructHint3d: The baseline series is not suitable for volume reconstruction; the bottom 3D view may be empty — use the left 2D stack as reference.
reconstructHint2d: The baseline series is not suitable for volume reconstruction; 3D is not available in this layout.
